name: Ignacy Jan Paderewski
description: Polish pianist, composer, supporter of Poland's independence movements, politician, Prime Minister of reborn Poland (1860–1941)
abstract: Ignacy Jan Paderewski (Polish: [iɡˈnatsɨ ˈjan padɛˈrɛfskʲi] ; 6 November [O.S. 25 October] 1860 [or 1859] – 29 June 1941) was a Polish pianist, composer, philanthropist, and statesman.

about_quotes.evidence: the family was related to Ignace Paderewski from Poland — the famous composer.
